use_cases: Display form validation status with destructive variant
Show category or tag labels in form sections
Indicate user roles or permissions in admin forms
Mark items with secondary attributes in data entry forms
Create visual hierarchy with outlined badges for optional form fields
ai_summary: A reusable badge component with four style variants (default, secondary, destructive, outline) designed for form interfaces. Built with class-variance-authority for consistent styling and features hover transitions, focus ring states for keyboard navigation, and Tailwind CSS utility classes. Ideal for displaying status indicators, tags, and labels within forms and data-heavy applications.
